steps.name: Navigate to '/' endpoint
Login to the site as 'SUPER'
Enter the user's email in the 'Email' field
Enter the user's password in the 'Password' field
Uncheck 'Remember me' checkbox
Press 'Login' button

testStage.description: Validates successful business unit addition to company (E2E test).

steps.name: Click on 'System administration' menu in Header
Click 'Companies and business units' tab
Verify: 'Add business unit' button is disabled before selecting a company
Select 'CompanyName' company using filter
Click 'Add business unit' button (+)
Verify: 'Add business unit' dialog is opened
Verify: Company name is pre-filled correctly
Click on the 'Create' button and trigger an error
Verify: Validation error is shown when merchant name is not filled
Fill in merchant name: MerchantNameTest
Click on the 'Create' button
Verify: Success alert is shown after business unit is added
Verify: Selected company is preserved after creation
Verify: New business unit name appears in the list
Verify: Merchant ID is displayed
